title: VLSM Campus Design
description: Design an efficient addressing scheme for a multi-site campus using VLSM.
problemStatement:
## Scenario: University Campus Network

You have been allocated the private address block `10.10.0.0/16`. Design an IP addressing scheme using **VLSM** for the following requirements.

| Location | Required Hosts |
|----------|----------------|
| Main Building (LAN A) | 500 |
| Library (LAN B) | 200 |
| Dormitory (LAN C) | 100 |
| Admin Office (LAN D) | 50 |
| WAN Link Router1-Router2 | 2 |
| WAN Link Router2-Router3 | 2 |

## Your Task

Provide the **Network Address** and **Subnet Mask (CIDR)** for each of the 6 segments. 

**Important:** Allocate them in the correct **VLSM order** (Largest to Smallest) to maximize address space conservation. List them in the order you would assign them.

1. Main Building
2. Library
3. Dormitory
4. Admin Office
5. WAN Link 1
6. WAN Link 2
hints: Start allocating from 10.10.0.0. Be careful with boundaries.
